must_not_detect.reason: Generic demographic range not identifying a person on its own
Standalone city/location mention is not identifying by itself
Generic mention without any MAC value present
Generic mention of an ID type without any number

uncertain.reason: Session identifier with spaced label; detection reliability may vary
Asset tag/device name may act as a device identifier but not clearly covered by device_serial_number rule
Street address is identifying but there is no explicit VN address rule in allowed set
Username is identifying; mapping to employee_id rule may be ambiguous for strict detectors
Draft quarterly financials are likely MNPI, but detection relies on contextual interpretation rather than explicit rule keywords
